subcodes.first_line: The missive from your excellency was laid before this Servant, betokening excessive grief and lamentation, and that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نوشته از آنجناب بین یدی عبد حاضر شد مشعر بود بر جزع و فزع زیاده از حد و آنچه
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @love of God, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @rejection, opposition and persecution, @wisdom [hikmat], @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
